title: Demise
description: Death is an inconvenience! Why not fix that?
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2bd12e21f06b5ba8ea0db2c10dac86c34fd94c2.png) **A simple mod that adds a convenient way to retrieve your items after your inevitable death** Adds a skull that stores all of your items from every slot in your inventory. Compatible with trinkets.
FAQ ***Q:Can I port this mod to XYZ loader? A: No. I'm not comfortable with any code being ported to other loaders, but some of the core code of this mod was provided by Nico_44, so it is under his original license, meaning porting is fully allowed, but i will not help or encourage it.*** ***Q: Can this mod be ported to XYZ version? A: Yes and No. I mod Minecraft in my free time, so any ports to other versions will only come when and if I have the time, but rest assured I am trying! If you want to port it yourself and have it published here, feel free to contact me.***
Spoiler Before you ask, yes this is inspired by CSMP
